title: Pineapple Makhani on Sundays
description: A herbal, light Indian (Goan) dish featuring pineapple chunks baked to perfection.
instructions: In a pan, heat oil over medium heat. Add cumin and coriander seeds; toast until fragrant.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic. Sauté for about 2 minutes or until softened.
Stir in finely chopped tomato and grated ginger. Mix well and cook for another minute.
Fold in fresh pineapple chunks and sprinkle with garam masala powder. Stir gently to combine.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish, ensuring even distribution of ingredients.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until the edges start to turn golden brown.
Let it cool slightly before serving warm or at room temperature.
